Petition Ascertaining Beneficiaries Of Trust.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Colleen Kelley for Morgan Stanley Trust (Pettiioner).

Ms. Kelley provided clarification as to the names of the Mothers of the Minor Children, stated that the name of "Diana Schlick" was included in error, and that Bridgit was not entitled as she was of age at the time of death. In addition, she stated that the Minor named Caleb had been left out. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. McDaniels.
